caption: A screen recording captures a video conference call. In the top right corner, a man wearing a dark baseball cap and a dark shirt is visible in a small video feed. The main area of the screen displays a digital workspace with a dark background containing several gray circular nodes and connecting lines. Centered in the workspace is a rectangular image showing green foliage and the word "SHARE" in bold, white, capital letters. Two small avatar icons are positioned near this image: one featuring a person with dark hair and glasses and another featuring a person with red hair. A blue curved line connects the two avatars. Across the top of the screen, several browser tabs are open, including one titled "True Learning by Systemenii," and a small text label "Save Beddinger" appears near the man's video feed. The scene remains static throughout the sequence, with no visible changes in movement or content.
